## Submission Checklist

Check each box **before** requesting review:

- [ ] **Module & Class**: Module `___`  Class `___`
- [ ] **Path**: my file is at `module-N/class_X/submissions/<MyName>_Class<N>.ext`
- [ ] **Format**: `.pdf`, `.docx`, `.ipynb`, or `.md` (nothing else — no `.xlsx`, `.py`, `.pages`)
- [ ] **Filename**: no placeholder text like `New Document`, `Untitled`, `Document1`, `hw1`, `(1)`, `(copy)`
- [ ] **Underscore**: class folder is `class_1` (underscore) — NOT `class-1` (dash)
- [ ] **Correct assignment**: I did the task for *this* class, not a different one
- [ ] **Only my file**: this PR only adds my own submission — no edits to teacher files or other students files
